channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Poco X8 Pro : noté 8/10, ce nouveau monstre d’autonomie signé Xiaomi, coûte déjà 35 % de moins
item.description: Après le X7 Pro, Xiaomi revient avec le Poco X8 Pro, un smartphone gamer qui mise sur un processeur véloce et une grosse batterie, pour assurer lors des sessions de jeu. De base à 403 euros, il peut vous revenir à seulement 259 euros.

item.title: Tubi and TikTok are partnering to produce long form series
item.description: Soon, some of TikTok's biggest personalities are going to be launching new streaming series on Tubi. Today, Tubi and TikTok announced that they are working together to launch a new Creatorverse Incubator that will help content creators produce long form original series for the Fox-owned streaming service. Once selected for the program, a group of […]...

item.title: Nothing Phone 4a Pro review: A midrange phone that rivals the Pixel 10a
item.description:
Nothing takes a different tack with its phone series. For the second time in a row, its midrange entry-level A-series smartphones debuted ahead of its next flagship device. The company has even warned that we won’t be getting the Nothing Phone 4 until next year. Until then, the Phone 4a Pro is here to make an impact, with a more restrained design, a less obtrusive camera bump and specs that beat out last year’s Nothing Phone 3 — all for $499. In 2026, Nothing is truly aiming to dethrone the Pixel 10a.
Hardware
Mat Smith for Engadget
It’s a new look. That’s often the case with Nothin...

item.title: Finalement, Meta ne fermera pas le métavers des casques Quest
item.description: Le métavers perd très littéralement une dimension. Meta va bientôt fermer le cercueil d'Horizon Worlds, la plateforme de réalité virtuelle des casques Quest. Elle ne disparait pas complètement, puisqu'elle a transité sur les smartphones. Mais tout de même, c'est un aveu d'échec cinglant pour le principal promoteur de cette technologie.

item.title: Alexa+ promises an AI layer over everything — I’m not sure anyone asked for that
item.description: Alexa+ makes voice assistants smarter and more natural than ever — but it may be solving a problem most people don’t actually have.

item.title: Nothing Phone 4A Pro review: That flagship feeling
item.description: CEO Carl Pei says Nothing won't release a flagship phone this year. So instead we have the 4A Pro, a $499 phone that looks and feels higher-end than last year's flagship Phone 3, helped in large part by a new metal design. Compare the Phone 4A Pro to its immediate rivals, the Pixel 10A and […]

item.title: Adobe’s AI image generator can now be trained on your own art
item.description: Adobe is launching customizable AI image generators that can mimic specific artistic styles and character designs. The Firefly Custom Models are available in public beta starting today, allowing creators and brands to train a model on their own assets to ensure generated images follow a consistent aesthetic for characters, illustrations, and photography. The tool aims […]...

item.title: Tubi joins forces with popular TikTokers to create original streaming content
item.description: Tubi launched its “Creatorverse Incubator” to help TikTokers create original shows exclusively for the streaming service.

item.title: Arc expands into electric commercial and defense boats with $50M raise
item.description: The Los Angeles startup raised $50 million from Eclipse, a16z, Menlo Ventures, and others as it seeks to expand beyond sport boats.

item.title: The new MacBook Air 15 M5 is great, but it's hard to justify when the still-excellent M4 model is $300 off
item.description: The 15-inch M4 MacBook Air (2025) just hit a record low of $1,099 at Amazon.

item.title: ‘Just a joy to use’ — I reviewed the new Nothing Phone (4a) Pro and its striking design, giant blazing screen, and useful Glyph Matrix reminded me that phones can actually be fun
item.description: With its sleek design, solid performance, and playful features, the Nothing Phone (4a) Pro has won me over from my conservative old handset.

item.title: J’ai testé cet OVNI, le Nothing Phone (4a) Pro : un petit écran au dos et un zoom bluffant pour son prix
item.description: Voici notre test complet du Nothing Phone (4a) Pro : un smartphone qui mise sur un bon rapport qualité-prix avec, en sus, un look hors norme.

item.title: I can finally make the UI of my Series X bright pink after the new Xbox dashboard update
item.description: A new Xbox update is rolling out in the coming weeks with some big upgrades.

item.title: This $25 AirPods Pro 3 case looks exactly like a classic Macintosh mouse — and could be the perfect Apple 50th anniversary tribute
item.description: Spigen’s new AirPods Pro 3 case is inspired by Macintosh mice from the 1980s.

item.title: 'A stunning mini PC offering powerful performance': Geekom A7 deal is a productivity beast for creatives - and it's $599 in Best Buy's tech sale
item.description: Geekom’s A7 2026 Mini PC delivers solid performance for creative tasks, everyday productivity and multitasking, and it's $140 off.

item.title: As the Cities: Skylines franchise turns 11, Iceflake Studios celebrates with a special anniversary patch that adds a new encyclopedia and a stadium for 'proper entertainment' to the second game
item.description: To celebrate the 11th anniversary of the Cities: Skyline franchise, Iceflake Studios has released a special Cities: Skyline 2 update featuring new gameplay features and two creator packs.

item.title: Les meilleurs claviers Android : notre sélection d’applications
item.description: Les claviers alternatifs sur Android sont très appréciés des utilisateurs. Souvent, ils permettent d'écrire plus efficacement et de taper plus vite. En voici une sélection des plus pertinents selon nous que ce soit pour leurs nombreuses fonctionnalités, leurs émojis ou leur personnalisation.

item.title: How to watch The 50 online from anywhere — including outside India and in the USA
item.description: Here's how to watch The 50 online from anywhere in the world, including free options.

item.title: 'We found out at the same time as the public' — Capcom and Ubisoft devs were out of the loop on Nvidia DLSS 5 involvement, adding to the AI controversy
item.description: Nvidia has dug itself a huge hole with its DLSS 5 reveal, leaving game developers and gamers outraged by its use of generative AI.

item.title: Feds intensify investigation into Tesla’s Full Self-Driving (Supervised) software
item.description: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration has upgraded its probe after finding more instances of Tesla's driving software struggling in low-visibility conditions.

item.title: Google envisagerait de revenir sur certains changements de Google Photos : ce que ça change
item.description: Les modifications apportées à Google Photos pour les 10 ans de l’application ne semblent pas avoir été bien accueillies par les utilisateurs. Un retour entendu qui pourrait conduire à un retour en arrière sur certains éléments.

item.title: Amazon brings Alexa+ to the UK
item.description: The company is currently letting users in the U.K. try out Alexa+ for free via an early access program.

item.title: Fitbit’s AI health coach will soon be able to read your medical records
item.description: Would you share your medical records with a personal trainer? How about a virtual one? Google, which this week announced it is giving Fitbit's AI health coach the ability to read your medical records, is hoping the answer is yes, following rivals like Amazon, OpenAI, and Microsoft in betting that users are willing to trade […]

item.title: Parfois, les écrans PC gamer Full HD 144 Hz ne coûtent pas plus de 80 €, la preuve
item.description: Fluide, réactif et nerveux, le Viewedge C2712FDA-P est un moniteur taillé pour le gaming que même les joueurs fauchés pourront s'offrir. En effet, Joybuy le propose à 79,99 euros au lieu de 119,99 euros.

item.title: 'My dream travel lens’ — Fujifilm asked which lens it should make next, and you voted for this wide-aperture zoom
item.description: Fujifilm asked fans which lens(es) it should make next from 14 concepts — and a dream travel zoom topped the poll.

item.title: Avec 900 km d’autonomie électrique, BMW explique pourquoi le moteur essence n’est plus nécessaire
item.description: Avec sa nouvelle voiture électrique à 900 km d'autonomie, BMW se sent confiant. Le patron de la technique chez BMW vient de couper court aux rumeurs. Pour le moment, le moteur essence à prolongateur d'autonomie ne fera pas son retour.

item.title: ‘Pluribus’ Might Ignore That Giant Bomb of a Season One Cliffhanger
item.description: Creator Vince Gilligan and star Rhea Seehorn joked that the Apple TV series could maybe just 'leave the box sitting in the driveway.'

item.title: Should You Hike in Boots or Trail Runners? (2026)
item.description: Lightweight shoes now dominate the trails, so do you still need boots? Here’s how to choose the right footwear for your outdoor adventures.

item.title: Uber to invest $1.25 billion in Rivian as part of new robotaxi deal
item.description: Uber and Rivian are joining forces to deploy 50,000 fully autonomous robotaxis over the next several decades, the companies announced Thursday. As part of the deal, Uber will invest $1.25 billion in Rivian through 2031, contingent on Rivian meeting certain autonomy milestones, starting with an initial $300 million at signing. (The deal is still subject […]...

item.title: Uber taps Rivian to build robotaxis in deal worth up to $1.25B
item.description: Uber is kicking off the partnership with an initial $300 million investment, while Rivian will provide as many as 50,000 autonomous R2 SUVs.

item.title: Dozens of European cloud CEOs call for real tech sovereignty ahead of Cloud and AI Development Act
item.description: 24 leaders, backed by CISPE, was asking the European Union to carefully consider how it goes about driving tech sovereignty.

item.title: UK fines 4chan nearly $700,000 for failing its online safety act obligations
item.description: UK’s Ofcom has fined 4chan a total of £520,000 ($690,000) over the website’s failure to comply with the rules of Online Safety Act 2023. The biggest chunk of the amount came from 4chan’s failure to ensure children cannot encounter pornographic content on its website by implementing an effective age check mechanism. For that violation, the website has received a penalty of £450,000 ($598,000) and an order to apply an age check system by April 2. It carries a daily rate penalty of £500 ($664) until the website is compliant or until June 1, whichever comes sooner. Ofcom also found that 4chan has ...

item.title: ‘Drives me crazy’: iOS 26.4 has fixed an infuriating keyboard bug, but one problem has still gone unsolved
item.description: Apple has released an iOS 26.4 beta that fixes keyboard bugs, but some issues remain.

item.title: Gigabyte's 16-inch video editing laptop with Ryzen AI 7, RTX 5060, and 32GB RAM is $350 off — but you'll need to act super-fast
item.description: Gigabyte's Aero X16 laptop for creatives and professionals with Ryzen AI 7, RTX 5060, and 32GB RAM is $350 off — but you'll need to act fast as time is ticking.

item.title: The best unlocked phone deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale — save on Samsung, Google, and more
item.description: Shop the best early unlocked phone deals from top brands during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Save on Samsung and Google.

item.title: Amazon casse en deux le prix de cet excellent ancien smartphone haut de gamme de Google
item.description: Le Google Pixel 9 a certes été dépassé par le Pixel 10, et le Pixel 11 est l'un des smartphones les plus attendus de 2026. Pour autant, le Pixel 9 reste un modèle tout à fait recommandable, surtout quand son prix passe de 899 euros à 449 euros sur Amazon. Il n'a jamais été moins cher sur la plateforme.

item.title: Après 18 ans d’existence et de difficultés, la plateforme française Deezer devient rentable pour la première fois de son histoire
item.description: La plateforme d'écoute musicale Deezer vient de publier ses résultats financiers de l'année 2025 et annonce un tournant. Pour la première fois de son histoire, Deezer affiche des résultats positifs et atteint la rentabilité, et ce 18 ans après sa création.

item.title: Soundcore Nebula X1 Pro Dolby Atmos Projector Review: Big, Brilliant
item.description: Ever wanted a complete Dolby Atmos cinema packed into a big wheelie case?

item.title: Saros has exclusive PS5 features like feeling 'eclipse-driven weaponry through adaptive triggers — but it's nothing we've not heard before
item.description: A new trailer has been released for Housemarque's upcoming action game, Saros, highlighting its PS5-exclusive features.

item.title: Virgin River season 8: everything we know about the Netflix show's return
item.description: Season 7 might have only just finished, but we've got questions. Here's everything we know so far about Netflix smash, Virgin River season 8.

item.title: Garmin could finally take on Whoop with a screenless fitness tracker next week — here’s what to expect
item.description: Rumors are swirling that we might finally get to see the screenless Cirqa smart band after months of speculation.

item.title: Le piège du moteur thermique : comment l’Europe est en train de livrer le marché automobile à la Chine et BYD
item.description: Certains constructeurs européens comme Stellantis et Mercedes sont en train de ralentir la cadence sur la voiture électrique. Les retours des moteurs diesel et des gros V8 ne trompent pas. Mais selon les experts, l'Europe est en train de faire un cadeau à la Chine, avec un risque énorme pour la survie de l'industrie locale à terme.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG First Partner Illustration Collection Series 1 has hit a new low price at Amazon
item.description: Pokémon TCG First Partner Illustration Collection preorders are live at Amazon. Buy now for under $60 at Amazon

item.title: DLSS 5 : Nvidia ouvre son filtre de « beauté » aux moddeurs, pourquoi c’est à double tranchant
item.description: Nvidia rendra disponible le DLSS 5 dans sa solution open-source Streamline. Cet arbitrage constitue une excellente nouvelle pour les moddeurs et la remise au goût du jour de jeux anciens... mais il présente aussi le risque de dénaturer certains titres.

item.title: The 'best budget drone' just hit a new record-low price at Amazon — the excellent DJI Mini 4K
item.description: The outstanding DJI Mini 4K just hit a brand new record-low price at Amazon today thanks to a surprise deal.

item.title: Votre montre Huawei gagne une fonction majeure : comment activer le paiement sans contact
item.description: Huawei a annoncé ce jeudi l'intégration du service de paiement sans contact Curve Pay sur ses montres connectées. De quoi vous permettre de payer directement à l'aide de votre montre.
